zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia de Lexington於1187年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾圖福德時，她的父親Richard of Lexington22歲，母親Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England17歲。她與William Markham結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。她去世於1238年在英國諾廷加姆爾享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia de Lexington于1187年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾圖福德时，她的父亲Richard of Lexington22岁，母亲Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England17岁。她与William Markham结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。她去世于1238年在英国諾廷加姆爾享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lexington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia de Lexington was born in 1187, in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richard of Lexington, was 22 and her mother, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, was 17. She married William Markham. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. She died in 1238, in Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia de Lexington est née en 1187, à Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard of Lexington, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William Markham. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Elle est décédée en 1238, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia de Lexington 1187 in Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard of Lexington 22 und ihre Mutter Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England 17. Sie hat William Markham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1238 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Lexington è nata il nel 1187 nel Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Richard of Lexington, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William Markham. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1238, nel Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Lexingtonが1187年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアトゥクスフォードで生まれた時，父Richard of Lexingtonは22歳，母Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, Englandは17歳であった。William Markhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼女は1238年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia de Lexington(이)가 1187년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 투스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard of Lexington(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 William Markham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 영국 노틴그함실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia de Lexington nasceu em 1187, em Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard of Lexington, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William Markham. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1238, em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia de Lexington родилась в 1187 г. в местности туксфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richard of Lexington было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Markham. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Она умерла в 1238 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia de Lexington nació en 1187, en Tuxford, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard of Lexington, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Matilda Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William Markham. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1238, en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años.
